title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: trustee-guest-components bug fix and enhancement update

full_text:
An update for trustee-guest-components is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
